growth_records.cite: Weiss, Anna S. et al. In vitro interaction network of a synthetic gut bacterial community. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01153-z. [PMC8941000]
growth_records.snippet: fast growing strains (GR > 1.5 h-1, E. faecalis KB1, B. animalis YL2, C. innocuum I46 and B. coccoides YL58) ... lactate production was confirmed for E. faecalis KB1, B. animalis YL2 ... B. animalis YL2 ... distinctly acidified the medium (
growth_records.notes: growth_rate 1.5 h-1 is the LOWER BOUND of the 'fast' bin (exact value in Table S2, not available). Lactate secretion qualitative (MS). Acidifies medium (pH_SM<6.2), consistent with acidogenic/lactic fermentation. No numeric rates or yields in main text.
